# Seattle Ball Machine Rental

> Professional tennis ball machine rental in Seattle, WA. Rent a Hydrogen Proton ball machine with 65 balls included for 2-hour practice sessions. Pickup in Queen Anne (near W McGraw St & 4th Ave W), then drive to any Seattle-area tennis court. Book online at https://www.seattleballmachine.com.

## Key facts

- Service: tennis ball machine rental (Hydrogen Proton machine)
- Service area: Seattle, WA and surrounding neighborhoods
- Pickup location: Queen Anne, Seattle (exact address provided after booking)
- Session length: 2 hours
- Included: ball machine, 65 tennis balls, pickup basket
- Pricing: $40 single session, $105 3-pack ($35/session), $300 10-pack ($30/session)
- Booking: online at https://www.seattleballmachine.com/book
- Phone: +1-253-252-9577
- Email: support@firstserveseattle.com
- Rain policy: free reschedule if rain affects your session (contact within 24 hours)
- Court requirements: works on any standard tennis court; renters secure their own court time
- Transport: the machine fits in any car

## Pages

- [Home / booking and pricing](https://www.seattleballmachine.com/)
- [Book a session](https://www.seattleballmachine.com/book)
- [Seattle tennis courts directory (38 public courts with drive times)](https://www.seattleballmachine.com/courts)
- [Neighborhoods served](https://www.seattleballmachine.com/tennis-ball-machine-rental)
- [Support and FAQs](https://www.seattleballmachine.com/support)
